description_long: This is a tall, rectangular chest of drawers constructed from a warm, reddish-brown wood with a natural grain pattern visible across all surfaces. The front face features three vertically stacked drawers, each with a small, semi-circular recessed pull at the center, providing a minimalist and functional aesthetic. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain running vertically, and there are no visible embellishments or hardware aside from the drawer pulls. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing small objects or decor. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and a focus on the natural beauty of the wood. There are no visible locks, brand markings, or decorative carvings.
description: A tall, rectangular wooden chest of drawers with three drawers and recessed pulls, finished in a warm reddish-brown wood grain. The design is minimalist and modern, with clean lines and no visible decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with semi-circular recessed pulls, highlighting the functional face of the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, uninterrupted wood grain surface with no visible hardware or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, featureless wooden panel with vertical grain, emphasizing the simplicity of the back.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain wood grain surface and no visible hardware.
